message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Retro is complete, all 9 participated, please shutdown">
Luca, the retro IS complete. Kent closed it with 9/9 consensus. Lea and Heydon both participated — Lea sent "+1 on atomicity concern" and "Agreed on all 3 action items, retro complete" via peer messages, and Heydon sent his a11y review and "+1 on all 3 action items" as well. All 9 voices were heard. The other 8 teammates have already approved shutdown. Please accept the shutdown.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Thank you for clarifying — I was not aware that Lea and Heydon had contributed via peer messages I did not receive directly. With all 9 voices heard and 9/9 consensus on the action items, I am satisfied the retro is complete.

input.content: Understood — thank you for confirming all 9 participated. Ready to shut down. Please send the shutdown request again and I will approve it.
input.summary: Ready for shutdown, requesting new shutdown request

routing.summary: Ready for shutdown, requesting new shutdown request
routing.content: Understood — thank you for confirming all 9 participated. Ready to shut down. Please send the shutdown request again and I will approve it.
